name: blender
description: Blender 3D creation suite command line interface.

installs.notes: Installs the Blender application bundle. On macOS, command line tools may need a manual symlink: `ln -s /Applications/Blender.app/Contents/MacOS/Blender /usr/local/bin/blender`.

commonFailures: On macOS, installing via Brew Cask puts the application in /Applications/Blender.app, but does not symlink the `blender` executable to the user's PATH by default. A symlink must be created manually.
Lacks GUI display context (e.g. on headless servers/CI/CD) — render operations should use the `-b` (background) flag.
